issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1200: remaining Python asset sweep 10/10

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1200 changes.

notes: This lane records and hardens an already-completed Python asset sweep rather than performing a fresh in-branch .py deletion.
Direct push to origin/main was preempted by concurrent lane updates, so the delivered commit was pushed to origin/BIG-GO-1200.
